records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... How much longer do I have to run to find the exit...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... How much longer do I have to run to find the exit...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... How much longer do I have to run to find the exit...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was that even really me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was that even really me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was that even really me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why... did I say those weird things?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why... did I say those weird things?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why... did I say those weird things?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! A rift just opened!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! A rift just opened!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! A rift just opened!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Noelle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Noelle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Noelle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! Mina?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! Mina?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! Mina?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't breakthrough space Joo Shiyoon's signature move?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't breakthrough space Joo Shiyoon's signature move?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't breakthrough space Joo Shiyoon's signature move?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop talking nonsense and grab my hand!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop talking nonsense and grab my hand!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop talking nonsense and grab my hand!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're going to break out of here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're going to break out of here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're going to break out of here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina, I think I broke my tailbone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina, I think I broke my tailbone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina, I think I broke my tailbone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you not to thrash around when falling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you not to thrash around when falling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you not to thrash around when falling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where are we? I thought we finally made it out, but... this isn't the inside of the ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where are we? I thought we finally made it out, but... this isn't the inside of the ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where are we? I thought we finally made it out, but... this isn't the inside of the ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I dunno where we are, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I dunno where we are, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I dunno where we are, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess we're at the right place since I can see her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess we're at the right place since I can see her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess we're at the right place since I can see her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When one faces one's own image in the mirror, they usually clash with themselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When one faces one's own image in the mirror, they usually clash with themselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When one faces one's own image in the mirror, they usually clash with themselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As images in the mirror become real in the Qlipha Dimension, it is common to be in an endless battle with an equal self...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As images in the mirror become real in the Qlipha Dimension, it is common to be in an endless battle with an equal self...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As images in the mirror become real in the Qlipha Dimension, it is common to be in an endless battle with an equal self...

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, you two made it out earlier than I anticipated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, you two made it out earlier than I anticipated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, you two made it out earlier than I anticipated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps that proves that you are different from ordinary people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps that proves that you are different from ordinary people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps that proves that you are different from ordinary people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that's...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that's...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that's...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've come to stop whatever it is you're trying to do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've come to stop whatever it is you're trying to do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've come to stop whatever it is you're trying to do.
